reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed: auctionCallback has a live non-test caller in BaseAuction.sol:449 (Gate 1 pass); entry point AuctionBidder.bid() is exercised by AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE holders, mapping to 'bidders' trust category (UNTRUSTED, in_scope_for_bug_bounty: true) in trust_assumptions (Gate 2 pass); src/AuctionBidder.sol is explicitly in scope (Gate 3 pass). An attacker holding AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE can trigger this via AuctionBidder.bid() by embedding Call(token, approve(attacker, MAX_UINT)) in the solution array, causing auctionCallback to execute the approval through _multiCall at L109 with no post-call allowance reset, allowing the attacker to call token.transferFrom(AuctionBidder, attacker, balance) in a follow-up transaction and drain the contract's ERC20 holdings. Severity HIGH aligns with BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json 'Significant loss of funds or protocol value extraction'; no deployment_context.client_diversity cap applies.
